name: Pathfinder Bancorp, Inc.
summary: Pathfinder Bancorp, Inc. is a Maryland-chartered bank holding company headquartered in Oswego, New York, operating through its wholly owned subsidiary Pathfinder Bank, a New York-chartered commercial bank. The Bank offers deposit accounts, commercial and residential real estate loans, commercial business loans, consumer loans, and investment securities. It operates thirteen branch offices across Oswego, Onondaga, and Oneida Counties, NY, serving individuals, families, small to mid-size businesses, and municipalities.

products.name: Deposit Accounts
products.description: FDIC-insured deposit products offered to retail and business customers in the Bank's market area.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Loans
products.description: Loans secured by commercial real estate properties originated in Oswego and Onondaga Counties.

products.name: Residential Real Estate Loans
products.description: Mortgage loans secured by residential real estate for individuals and families.

products.name: Commercial Business Loans
products.description: Loans to small and mid-size businesses including unsecured small business loans.

products.name: Consumer Loans
products.description: Consumer loans including unsecured personal loans to individuals in the market area.

products.name: Investment Securities
products.description: Investments in U.S. government, agency, municipal, corporate, mortgage-backed, and asset-backed securities.

products.name: Trust Preferred Securities
products.description: $5.2 million in trust preferred securities issued through Pathfinder Statutory Trust II.

partnerships.partner_name: Federal Home Loan Bank of New York
partnerships.description: Member institution; uses FHLB-NY as a borrowing and funding source.
Purchased the Company's majority membership interest in FitzGibbons Agency, LLC in October 2024.
